sentences.arabic: يُعْتَبَرُ الكَرَمُ مِنْ أَهَمِّ القِيَمِ فِي الثَّقَافَةِ العَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Gostoprimstvo se smatra jednom od najvažnijih vrijednosti u arapskoj kulturi.
sentences.translationEn: Hospitality is considered one of the most important values in Arab culture.

sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا يَزُورُ الضَّيْفُ البَيْتَ، يَسْتَقْبِلُهُ صَاحِبُ المَنْزِلِ بِتَرْحِيبٍ حَارٍّ.
sentences.translation: Kada gost posjeti kuću, domaćin ga srdačno dočekuje.
sentences.translationEn: When a guest visits a house, the host welcomes them warmly.

sentences.arabic: يُقَدِّمُ العَرَبُ القَهْوَةَ المُرَّةَ وَالتَّمْرَ لِلضُّيُوفِ تَعْبِيرًا عَنِ المَوَدَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Arapi gostima poslužuju gorku kafu i hurme kao izraz naklonosti.
sentences.translationEn: Arabs serve bitter coffee and dates to guests as an expression of affection.

sentences.arabic: لَا يَجُوزُ أَنْ يُغَادِرَ الضَّيْفُ دُونَ أَنْ يَتَنَاوَلَ الطَّعَامَ.
sentences.translation: Gost ne bi trebao otići a da ne pojede obrok.
sentences.translationEn: A guest should not leave without eating food.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ العَادَاتُ تُقَوِّي الرَّوَابِطَ بَيْنَ النَّاسِ فِي المُجْتَمَعِ.
sentences.translation: Ovi običaji jačaju veze među ljudima u društvu.
sentences.translationEn: These customs strengthen the bonds between people in society.
